message:
refactor(render-canvas): replace hardcoded color literals with config-driven theme properties

Replace 8 hardcoded CSS color strings (#6c757d, #94a3b8, #475569,
#ffffff, #666666) in the canvas renderer with references to
self.config.label_color, self.config.node_stroke, and
self.config.node_fill. This ensures cluster titles, lifeline strokes,
gantt section labels, combined fragment borders/labels, and edge label
backgrounds all respect the configured theme instead of being locked
to a specific light-mode palette.

Minor viewport adjustment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
